name: Slab on grade with R-10 XPS perimeter, 2 ft depth, no under-slab
description: Slab on grade with R-10 XPS perimeter, 2 ft depth, no under-slab
note: MA base code requires R-10, 2 ft for CZ5. Vertical or horizontal.

name: Slab on grade with R-10 XPS perimeter (4 ft) + R-10 under-slab
description: Slab on grade with R-10 XPS perimeter (4 ft) + R-10 under-slab
note: Under-slab R-10 plus deeper perimeter; cuts slab-edge losses substantially. Approaches Passive House detailing.

name: Slab on grade with R-20 XPS perimeter + R-20 under-slab
description: Slab on grade with R-20 XPS perimeter + R-20 under-slab
note: Passive House-grade slab assembly. Capillary break (poly + gravel). Required for net-zero pathway.

name: Basement wall, interior R-15 2x4 wall + FG, drywall
description: Basement wall, interior R-15 2x4 wall + FG, drywall
note: Most-common MA basement finish. Risk of mold if condensation occurs behind framing — requires capillary break and air seal.

name: Basement wall, exterior R-15 XPS, dampproofed
description: Basement wall, exterior R-15 XPS, dampproofed
note: Best practice for new construction: keeps masonry warm and dry. Protect XPS above grade with parge/coating.

name: Basement, R-10 XPS direct-applied + 2x4/R-13 FG, drywall
description: Basement, R-10 XPS direct-applied + 2x4/R-13 FG, drywall
note: XPS as capillary break + thermal layer; framed wall inboard. Total R~22; controls condensation in CZ5/6.

name: Basement wall, 3" ccSPF on bare concrete, no studwall
description: Basement wall, 3" ccSPF on bare concrete, no studwall
note: ccSPF directly on poured concrete or CMU. Acts as capillary + air + vapor barrier. Thermal-barrier coverage required if exposed (15-min code).

name: Vented crawlspace — insulation in floor assembly above (see ENV.FLOOR rows)
description: Vented crawlspace — insulation in floor assembly above (see ENV.FLOOR rows)
note: Vented crawl: insulate the floor above, not the crawl walls. 1 sf NFA per 150 sf crawl floor (or 1:1500 with ground vapor retarder per R408.2).

name: Conditioned (sealed) crawl, R-15 XPS on crawl walls
description: Conditioned (sealed) crawl, R-15 XPS on crawl walls
note: Unvented/conditioned crawl per IRC R408.3: continuous vapor retarder on ground sealed to walls; insulate walls and rim, not floor; mechanical exhaust or supply air required.

name: Frost-protected shallow foundation, R-10 vertical + R-10 horizontal wing
description: Frost-protected shallow foundation, R-10 vertical + R-10 horizontal wing
note: FPSF approved for heated buildings per IRC R403.3 / ASCE 32. Wing dimension per Figure R403.3(1) for site air-freezing index. Eliminates need to dig to frost depth.
